sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the use of rar.exe, on the command line, to create an archive with password protection or with a specific compression level. This is pretty indicative of malicious actions.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
